generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR providing point clouds for clustering & tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloud
]
instance IntelDepthSenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel DepthSense D435i depth camera supplying visual data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImage
]
instance VehicleInternalSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle internal speed sensor delivering real‑time vehicle speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]
instance VehicleInternalSteeringSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle internal steering sensor delivering real‑time steering angle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringData
]

instance LiDARPointCloud : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]
instance DepthImage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthSenseD435iCamera
]
instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleInternalSpeedSensor
]
instance VehicleSteeringData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleInternalSteeringSensor
]

instance LiDARClusterData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "DBSCAN clustered LiDAR point cloud for subsequent tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreProcessingFE
]
instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter tracked object tracks derived from clustered LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccComputationFE
]
instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated vehicle speed and steering state stored in real‑time SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataCollectionFE
]
instance DesiredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "ACC desired speed calculated by algorithm in cloud"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AccComputationFE
]
instance TrafficReportData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series traffic reports generated from vehicle and environment data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReportingFE
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Collects raw speed and steering data, publishes vehicle state to cloud"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, RemoteManagementService
]
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs DBSCAN clustering and Kalman‑filter tracking on LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]
instance AccComputationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Computes ACC desired speed in cloud and offloads computation to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]
instance VisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Feeds live vehicle state and surroundings to 3D visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:enables ThreeDVisualizationService
]
instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Stores and generates time‑series traffic reports in road‑side SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimeSeriesReportingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time UI displays vehicle speed, steering, path and object tracks, with reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleSpeedInsight, ObjectTrackInsight, TrafficReportInsight, PerformanceMetricInsight
]
instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC algorithm to cloud, managing lead‑vehicle detection and desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:provides DesiredSpeedInsight, ACCDecisionInsight
]
instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables enable/disable ACC, speed settings and emergency braking via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, DisableACCAction, SetSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]
instance ThreeDVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Displays live vehicle state and surrounding environment in 3D visualization FE"
    DTDFVocab:provides ThreeDVisualizationInsight
]
instance TimeSeriesReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates time‑series reports of vehicle and traffic state"
    DTDFVocab:provides TrafficReportInsight
]

instance VehicleSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on real‑time vehicle speed monitoring"
]
instance ObjectTrackInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on detected object tracks and clustering"
]
instance TrafficReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on traffic reports and time‑series data"
]
instance PerformanceMetricInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on performance metrics such as latency and accuracy"
]
instance ParameterTuningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on parameter tuning recommendations for ACC and tracking"
]
instance DesiredSpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on calculated desired speed for ACC"
]
instance ACCDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on ACC decision making for lead‑vehicle detection"
]
instance ThreeDVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on live 3D visualization of vehicle state and environment"
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to enable the Adaptive Cruise Control feature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance DisableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to disable the Adaptive Cruise Control feature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance SetSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust desired vehicle speed through remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to initiate emergency braking through actuation FE"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity publishes desired speed and steering commands via ROS 2 topics to the Data Translation FE, which then forwards the actuators to the Physical Twin Entity; emergency brake and ACC enable/disable signals issued in the UI are also routed through the Actuation FE to the vehicle’s electronic speed controller; all commands are transmitted over the same Wi‑Fi connection ensuring sub‑100 ms end‑to‑end latency."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time DT with an end‑to‑end latency requirement of ≤100 ms (3GPP 22.185). Data is processed per perception cycle, ensuring the DT’s decisions reflect the latest sensor information."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The constellation is a three‑entity, entity‑based architecture: (1) Physical Twin Entity on the vehicle comprising sensors and actuators; (2) Digital Twin Entity running the computational models, data storage, and user services; (3) User Entity delivering a 3‑D visualization UI and control panel; cross‑entity Data Translation FE mediates data exchange."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The engineering lifecycle comprises (1) Requirements definition (R1–R8), (2) Architecture design based on ISO 23247 mapping of functional entities, (3) Implementation of SW packages as ROS2 nodes, (4) Deployment on distributed hardware, and (5) Verification via live testing on the 1/10‑scale vehicle.  No explicit manufacturing or mass‑production phases are described; the DT lifecycle stops at deployment and operational validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Real‑time fidelity is enforced by the ≤ 100 ms end‑to‑end latency requirement, ensuring timely ACC decisions.  The DT’s sensor‑based models (DBSCAN, Kalman) operate on raw data, with unit conversions handled by the Data Translation FE, guaranteeing consistency between virtual and physical representations.  No formal static verification or probabilistic error bounds are detailed."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑entity communication occurs over Wi‑Fi using the ROS2 middleware (DDS/RTPS).  The Data Translation FE provides serialization and unit conversion, enabling seamless exchange of messages between the Physical Twin Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT computation offloading (ACC) runs on a cloud host; the Local DT components (data collection, actuation) run on the onboard NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano; the Physical Twin Entity resides on the vehicle’s hardware.  All components communicate over the vehicle‑to‑cloud Wi‑Fi link and intra‑vehicle ROS2 network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 reference architecture is the core design framework; ISO 30173 terminology is referenced for generic DT concepts; ROS 2 provides an open‑source messaging standard; OPC UA is considered for future data translation; all FEs adhere to the entity‑based RA."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety‑critical: end‑to‑end latency capped at 100 ms, emergency braking capability. No specific security mechanisms (encryption, authentication) are described in the document."
]
